name: coretex-evaluator-v2-dgen1-policy-r5
_reclaimedRegionsNote: r5 PROTOCOL EPOCH: the RetrievalKeys (384-671) + Codebook (896-991) WORDS are reclaimed for typed PolicyAtoms. Their STATIC forms (dense lens, static EvidencePolicy) failed empirically — r5 reuses their words, not their semantics. Under this r5 pin, RetrievalKeys are NOT decoded as a dense lens (lens/anchor knobs INERT) and the words 384-671 read as evidence-bundle(384-511)/conflict_lifecycle(512-639)/abstention(640-671) atoms; 896-991 is reserved r5 policy capacity (MUST be zero).

firstStageTopKSelection.reason: inherited from deep-r1; calibration unchanged for the r5 epoch.

_r5PolicyNote: PolicyAtom budget encodes beta*1000 (Phase-1 oracle used beta=1.0 => budget 1000): per-query nudge = (budget/1000)*(max-min rerankerScore of the query's OWN candidate list). Per-family caps (policyMaxBudget*) clamp the nudge (anti-flood). Abstention is a SPLIT: the miner atom carries the public no-evidence-path policy (selector MISSING_EVIDENCE + flag REQUIRE_NO_EVIDENCE_PATH); the confidence gate policyAbstentionTop1Threshold is OPERATOR-CALIBRATED (Qwen top1 saturates ~0.9994 abstain vs ~0.9998 answerable; 0.9995 is a candidate, re-calibrate per deployment). Evidence-bundle = PUBLIC support/provenance structure only (no answer identity). Conflict_lifecycle is zero-DAMAGE, strong-lift, beta-robust with junk->topK movement that the scorer measures + guards. Oracle verdict: evidence +0.299 / conflict +0.432 / abstention AUC 0.90 (R5_A100_ORACLE_FINDINGS.md). Subject-scope/noise/aspect REMAIN RESERVED (no light version).
_candidateNote: DGEN-1 r5 PolicyAtom candidate, derived from evaluator-profile-v2-dgen1-deep-r1.json with pipelineVersion bumped to coretex-retrieval-v2-policy-r5 + the 3 PASS-family enables. All r4 knobs identical to deep-r1. NOT launch-signed; baseline unpinned (runtime per-epoch). majorDeltaThreshold=10 candidate; LAUNCH must recalibrate to ~5% of the launch corpus eval_hidden population.
_controllerNote: Identical launch controller calibration to deep-r1 (qualityHighThresholdMult=1, rampUpMaxRatio 1.1). Sourced via controllerParamsFromProfile().
